description_long: This object is a vintage-style wooden hand plane, featuring a rectangular wooden body with a smooth, matte finish and a prominent, curved black handle at the rear. The front section houses a slanted metal blade, partially embedded in the wood, with a visible wedge securing it in place. The handle is ergonomically shaped, likely made of painted or stained wood, and is designed for a comfortable grip. The body of the plane is solid, with a slightly rounded top and flat base, and some faint markings or text are visible on one side. The overall construction suggests durability and traditional craftsmanship, with the metal blade and wedge being the only non-wooden components. The object exudes a utilitarian, classic aesthetic, suitable for woodworking or display in a workshop or garage setting.
description: A classic wooden hand plane with a curved black handle and a slanted metal blade, featuring a solid rectangular body and a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the end of the wooden body, the curved black handle, and the metal blade slot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden body, the slanted metal blade, and the ergonomic handle.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the handle and the solid wooden end of the plane.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the side profile, visible text markings, and the arrangement of the blade and handle.
attribute_brand_logo: There is faint text and markings on one side of the wooden body, including a serial number and some symbols, but no distinct brand logo is visible.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is curved, ergonomically contoured, and appears to be made of black-painted or stained wood. It has a smooth surface with a matte finish and is shaped for a comfortable grip.
